mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_grade ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT * FROM sys_grade
AND grade_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{gradeName}, '%')
AND remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{remark}, '%')
ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_grade (grade_name, sort_order, status, remark) VALUES (#{gradeName}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_grade SET grade_name=#{gradeName}, sort_order=#{sortOrder}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark} WHERE grade_id=#{gradeId}
